name: POST /api/leads - Capture a new lead from any source
description: Public lead-capture endpoint. Anonymous visitors POST from the marketing site; admin tooling POSTs with source='referral' / 'broker' / 'campaign'. owner_id is null until a presales user claims the lead.
skipReason: lead-service runs on its own port (4011 per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP) but the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

payload.notes: {{static:Looking for a 3-bedroom villa in Karjat, move-in ready.}}
